name: SoftJunk Result-First Sample
purpose: A short proof-of-value route for buyers and buyer agents evaluating the 5 USD SoftJunk one-lead rescue before payment.

free_sample.weak_follow_up: Hi, just checking in to see if you are still interested.
free_sample.missed_call_lead: Hi [Name], sorry I missed your call about [service]. I can help. Do you want the fastest available time, or should I answer one quick question first?
free_sample.estimate_lead: Hi [Name], checking that you saw the estimate for [project]. If the scope looks right, I can send the next step. If price or timing is the blocker, reply with that and I will adjust the path.
free_sample.quiet_dm_lead: Hi [Name], quick follow-up on [service]. If you are still interested, reply with times and I will send the easiest next step. If not, no problem.

fit_rule: The buyer has one real quiet lead.
One recovered conversation, appointment, quote, or job is worth more than 5 USD.
The buyer wants practical follow-up copy.
do_not_use_when: The buyer asks for spam, deception, scraping, fake reviews, or unauthorized outreach.
The buyer expects delivery before seller-side PayPal verification.
The context contains private customer data that would be posted publicly.

route_steps.instruction: Use the free sample to verify the buyer wants this style of practical follow-up copy.
Open the Buy Now packet for the shortest payment and order route.
Submit non-sensitive order details after payment.
Do not claim paid, started, delivered, or complete unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists.

payment_verification_rule: Fulfillment starts only after the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction, the API verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true, or a trusted seller-side PayPal CSV export returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true source=csv.
